query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "dopd: dual on-policy distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing a canonical example of "corpus distillation" (a core component of the user's "DOPD" topic) applied to LLM training, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for measuring the independent variable (distillation) on the relevant domain (LLMs). Although the specific "Dual On-policy" mechanism and biomedical domain differ from the user's likely general CS focus, the paper is essential prior work for any literature review on LLM
